verses.5: Hal fee thalika qasamun lithee hijrin
verses.6: Alam tara kayfa faAAala rabbuka biAAadin
verses.8: Allatee lam yukhlaq mithluha fee albiladi
verses.15: Faamma alinsanu itha ma ibtalahu rabbuhu faakramahu wanaAAAAamahu fayaqoolu rabbee akramani
verses.16: Waamma itha ma ibtalahu faqadara AAalayhi rizqahu fayaqoolu rabbee ahanani
verses.21: Kalla itha dukkati alardu dakkan dakkan
verses.23: Wajeea yawmaithin bijahannama yawmaithin yatathakkaru alinsanu waanna lahu alththikra
